info.name: HT-CONS-CLM-MD-3
info.description:
Hybrid Treasury Consolidation — $10M Portfolio · 6-Month Horizon
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

FOUR ASSET CLASSES in a single consolidated simulation:

  1. OPERATIONAL WORKING CAPITAL (AR/AP dynamic discounting)
     4 Accounts Receivable: $250K–$400K, Net 30–60 day terms
       AR-001: LINEAR early settle, AR-002: EXPONENTIAL, AR-003: at maturity
       AR-004: LINEAR early settle
     3 Accounts Payable: $150K–$250K, Net 30–45 day terms
       AP-001: LINEAR early settle, AP-002: at maturity
       AP-003: STEPWISE penalty (late settle)

  2. TRADITIONAL INVESTMENTS (T-Bills)
     TBILL-3mo-1500K: $1.5M, 91 days, ~4.3% annualized
     TBILL-4mo-1000K: $1.0M, 122 days, ~4.4% annualized
     TBILL-5mo-500K:  $500K, 153 days, ~4.5% annualized

  3. DIGITAL ASSETS (BTC + ETH via CLM)
     BTC-CLM: $2M / 20 BTC, AllocationDriftModel 14%/20%/27%
       Price path: $100K→$155K peak→$148K (48% appreciation with volatility)
     ETH-CLM: $1M / 300 ETH, AllocationDriftModel 6%/10%/14.5%
       Price path: $3.35K→$5.2K peak→$4.9K (46% appreciation with volatility)

  4. STABLECOIN HOLDINGS (USDC)
     USDC-HOLD-500K: $500K @ 4.2% yield, instant payment capability
     Peg deviation monitoring via USDC_PEG_DEV_01

CASH MANAGEMENT (JS layer, NOT hardcoded):
  CASH-PAM-10M: $10M initial, flows derived from contract events
  Phase 0 asset-only run → JS captures all events → registers as
  ScheduledCashFlowModels (7 SCF) → Cash PAM uses treasuryModels
  Cash goes up (AR settlements, T-bill maturities, DA sell proceeds, USDC yield)
  Cash goes down (deployments, AP payments)
  LiquidityBufferModel ensures minimum $150K / target $500K buffer

TWO-PASS ARCHITECTURE (no code changes needed):
  Phase 0: Reference Indexes (6 market data series)
  Phase 1: Risk Models (2 ADM + 3 ES + 1 ES-AP + 1 PA)
  Phase 2: Asset-Only ACTUS run → JS derives market-value proceeds
  Phase 3: Register derived RI (5) + SCF (7) + LB (1) via JS pre-request
  Phase 4: Consolidated scenario (28 descriptors)
  Phase 5: Verification
  Phase 6: Full simulation (15 contracts, all asset classes)

TIME HORIZONS (research-based):
  AR/AP: Net 30-60 days (standard trade finance terms)
  T-Bills: 3-5 months (US Treasury standard maturities)
  Digital Assets: 6-month CLM with bi-weekly monitoring
  Stablecoins: 6-month holding with monthly yield
  Overall: 2026-03-01 → 2026-08-31

REQUIRES: actus-risk-service-extension (port 8082) + actus-service (port 8083)
NO CODE CHANGES to either service — collection-only configuration.

ENHANCED FEATURES (Progressive Profit + CFO Discretion + Reload Queue):
  Risk Tolerance: CONSERVATIVE
  Progressive Profit: +20% intervals, lock 20% each
  CFO Discretion: Context-aware stop-loss
  Reload Queue: 50/50 split on exit, +30% recovery

item.name: ══ PHASE 2: Asset-Only ACTUS Run (derive market-value proceeds) ══

exec: console.log('✅ ht_cons_phase0_scn01: 12 descriptors (6 RI + 2 ADM + 3 ES + 1 PA)');});

item.name: 2.2 Run Phase 0 — capture events, derive market-value proceeds

exec: pm.test('Phase 0: capture all asset events, derive cash flows', function(){
console.log('━ PHASE 2.2: Asset-Only Run — ' + contracts.length + ' contracts returned');
// ══════ A: Extract events from each contract ══════
// BTC CLM: extract IED and PP events
// ══════ B: Convert sell maps to arrays ══════
allFlows.sort(function(a,b){ return a.time < b.time ? -1 : a.time > b.time ? 1 : 0; });
// T-bill values (at face less accreted discount)
portfolioTimeline.push({time:t, value: Math.round(cashTimeline[i].value + btcVal + ethVal + tbillVal + 500000)});
// ══════ E: Store derived data in collection variables ══════
console.log('  BTC sells: ' + btcSells.length + ' market-value inflows');
console.log('  ETH sells: ' + ethSells.length + ' market-value inflows');

item.name: ══ PHASE 3: Register Derived Data + Cash Models (JS) ══

exec: // ── Load all derived data from Phase 0 ──
if(!dDeploy||!dBtcSells||!dCash){throw new Error('Phase 0 derived data missing — run Phase 2 first');}
console.log('Phase 3: 12 derived registrations dispatched (5 RI + 7 SCF)');
console.log('✅ lb_tr01: LiquidityBufferModel for consolidated treasury');
console.log('━ Phase 3 complete: 5 derived RI + 7 SCF + 1 LB registered');});
console.log('  13 RI + 2 ADM + 4 ES + 1 PA + 7 SCF + 1 LB');});

console.log('  BTC-CLM: ' + evts.length + ' events, PP_nonzero=' + pps.length
console.log('  ETH-CLM: ' + evts.length + ' events, PP_nonzero=' + pps.length
console.log('  ' + id + ': ' + evts.length + ' events (AR inflow), net=$'
console.log('  ' + id + ': ' + evts.length + ' events (AP outflow), net=$'
console.log('  Digital assets: BTC 20 units + ETH 300 units');
